name: Inflection AI
description: Registers Inflection AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat and embeddings provider with config discovery.

env.description: Fallback Inflection AI API key used for config discovery, chat inference, and embeddings when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Inflection AI API key
settings.description: Inflection AI API key used for config discovery, chat inference, and embeddings. Falls back to INFLECTION_API_KEY.

providers.name: Inflection AI
providers.description: Registers Inflection OpenAI-compatible chat completions models and refreshes organization-visible configs from /v1/discovery/configs.

providers.name: Inflection AI Embeddings
providers.description: Provides Inflection embeddings through the /v1/embeddings endpoint.
